name: Miguel O'Hara- Au How to Train Your Dragon
description:
Miguel O'Hara in "How to train your Dragon".

I don't know what I'm doing, I just watched How to Train Your Dragon recently and for some reason I stopped to think that Miguel would look very stylish flying on top of a Stormcutter, and also because I have a thing for Valka, and I stopped to think how cool it would be to make the characters of the Spider-Man multiverse in Httyd! Enjoy, and I apologize for any bugs if they occur.

Attention: I have noticed some small errors during some of my chats with my bots, I would like to ask that anyone who can say if they are having any problems or bugs to post here in the feedback for me to try to solve, thank you :)
creator: AngelofLux_x
